prompt:
Goal: Create a high-end fantasy warrior character sheet for a young Japanese male knight, designed for AI drama or game production.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition, dark neutral gray studio background, realistic cinematic lighting, no decorative border. Divide the image into 4 vertical panels: 3 full-body turnaround views on the left and center, and 1 close-up portrait panel on the right.

Layout: Show exactly 4 character views. View 1: full-body front view, standing upright and facing camera, shield on the left arm and sword held downward in the right hand. View 2: full-body left side profile, sword angled downward and round shield visible on the arm. View 3: full-body back view, showing the cape and rear armor silhouette, sword held downward at the right side. View 4: close-up three-quarter bust portrait on the right, intense eye contact, sword raised diagonally across the chest in the foreground. Add a small white label near the bottom of the portrait panel reading exactly: 3 (GPT Image 2).

Subject details: The warrior is a serious young adult man with messy spiky black hair, sharp dark eyes, lightly weathered skin, and a stern focused expression. He wears ornate dark navy-black plate armor with bronze/gold trim, layered shoulder pauldrons, leather straps, metal gauntlets, greaves, black boots, and a tattered dark cloak. The chest armor has a circular sunburst emblem with a red jewel at the center. The round shield is dark blue and bronze with radial metal segments and a central red gem. The sword is an ornate silver fantasy blade with angular cutouts, gold accents, and several small red gem inlays.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic fantasy concept art, premium character turnaround sheet, detailed metal scratches, worn leather, subtle dirt and battle wear, realistic fabric folds, dramatic but controlled studio light, crisp focus, high resolution, cinematic realism similar to a AAA RPG character design.

Constraints: Keep the same character, armor, shield, cloak, and sword consistent across all 4 views. Use exactly 4 views and exactly 1 visible text label. Do not add extra characters, extra weapons, logos, watermarks, UI elements, or background scenery.
promptEn:
Goal: Create a high-end fantasy warrior character sheet for a young Japanese male knight, designed for AI drama or game production.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition, dark neutral gray studio background, realistic cinematic lighting, no decorative border. Divide the image into 4 vertical panels: 3 full-body turnaround views on the left and center, and 1 close-up portrait panel on the right.

Layout: Show exactly 4 character views. View 1: full-body front view, standing upright and facing camera, shield on the left arm and sword held downward in the right hand. View 2: full-body left side profile, sword angled downward and round shield visible on the arm. View 3: full-body back view, showing the cape and rear armor silhouette, sword held downward at the right side. View 4: close-up three-quarter bust portrait on the right, intense eye contact, sword raised diagonally across the chest in the foreground. Add a small white label near the bottom of the portrait panel reading exactly: 3 (GPT Image 2).

Subject details: The warrior is a serious young adult man with messy spiky black hair, sharp dark eyes, lightly weathered skin, and a stern focused expression. He wears ornate dark navy-black plate armor with bronze/gold trim, layered shoulder pauldrons, leather straps, metal gauntlets, greaves, black boots, and a tattered dark cloak. The chest armor has a circular sunburst emblem with a red jewel at the center. The round shield is dark blue and bronze with radial metal segments and a central red gem. The sword is an ornate silver fantasy blade with angular cutouts, gold accents, and several small red gem inlays.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic fantasy concept art, premium character turnaround sheet, detailed metal scratches, worn leather, subtle dirt and battle wear, realistic fabric folds, dramatic but controlled studio light, crisp focus, high resolution, cinematic realism similar to a AAA RPG character design.

Constraints: Keep the same character, armor, shield, cloak, and sword consistent across all 4 views. Use exactly 4 views and exactly 1 visible text label. Do not add extra characters, extra weapons, logos, watermarks, UI elements, or background scenery.
promptZh:
目标：为 一位年轻的日本男性骑士 创建一张高端奇幻战士角色表，专为 AI 剧集或游戏制作设计。

画布：宽屏 16:9 构图，深灰色中性摄影棚背景，逼真的电影级光效，无装饰边框。将图像分为 4 个垂直面板：左侧和中间为 3 个全身转向视图，右侧为 1 个特写肖像面板。

布局：展示 4 个角色视图。视图 1：全身正面，直立面向镜头，左臂持盾，右手持剑下垂。视图 2：全身左侧侧面，剑向下倾斜，手臂上可见圆形盾牌。视图 3：全身背面，展示斗篷和后部盔甲轮廓，剑在右侧下垂。视图 4：右侧四分之三胸像特写，眼神坚定，剑在前景斜举于胸前。在肖像面板底部附近添加一个白色小标签，内容必须为：3 (GPT Image 2)。

主体细节：战士是一位严肃的年轻男性，拥有 凌乱的黑色尖刺发型、锐利的深色眼睛、略显风霜的皮肤和严峻专注的表情。他穿着华丽的深海军蓝黑色板甲，配有青铜/金色饰边、分层肩甲、皮带、金属护手、胫甲、黑色靴子和破旧的深色斗篷。胸甲中心有一个带有红色宝石的圆形太阳纹章。圆形盾牌为深蓝色和青铜色，带有放射状金属段和中央红色宝石。剑是一把华丽的银色奇幻长剑，带有棱角分明的镂空设计、金色装饰和几颗红色宝石镶嵌。

视觉风格：超写实奇幻概念艺术，高级角色三视图，精细的金属划痕、磨损的皮革、细微的污垢和战斗磨损，逼真的织物褶皱，戏剧性但受控的摄影棚光效，清晰对焦，高分辨率，类似于 AAA 级 RPG 角色设计的电影级写实感。

约束：确保所有 4 个视图中的角色、盔甲、盾牌、斗篷和剑保持一致。使用 4 个视图和 1 个可见文本标签。不要添加额外的角色、武器、徽标、水印、UI 元素或背景场景。
